title: Summer 2022 plan (pre-OSU sophomore-year)
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir maps a 7-bucket summer 2022: travel (Sept), 1-2 summer classes, brother time with Yermy, part-time job for travel cash, side-money project, body work, learning (C++ review).
  • Constraint: Yermy gone July 5–30, so June + August become the constructive-brother-time windows (⅔ of summer).
  • Frames the term he's wrapping as "unsuccessful yet productive — no love, no connection, grinded my balls off."
  • Job is meant to be part-time, not full — wants to keep bandwidth for the side-income experiment and travel budgeting.
  • Signs off "YG" — early instance of his initialed sign-off pattern that recurs through 2023 "thoughts and things" notes.

Notes

Late-spring OSU freshman-end planning doc — the dilemma is income optimization (real job vs. higher-leverage side hustle) but he resolves to do both via part-time. The Yermy-window math is explicit and emotional: "our time together will be shortened — I really have to take that into consideration." This is the same brother-as-priority orientation that anchors emilio / Yermy across the corpus. The September travel goal is the seed of the fall 2022 trip thread that surfaces elsewhere. Closes with the "sign off for now, YG" tag — proto-version of the 2023 "Yahir Gonzalez" sign off.

Connections
